response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the entire video content. 2. Identified the content as a promotional talk-style video for various merchandise (Holoka cards, plushies, acrylic stands, and a pop-up shop). 3. Checked for any musical performances featuring vocals by the VTubers. 4. Confirmed that while there is background audio, there are no vocal song performances as defined in the task. Therefore, 'contains_vocal_music' is set to 'false' for all scenes.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for Hololive products (cards, plushies, acrylic stands) featuring the VTuber group FLOW GLOW. The video consists of the group members talking about various upcoming products and events, with no full vocal song performances.

scenes.description: The members of FLOW GLOW introduce themselves and the video content.
The members promote the new 'Holoka' card set featuring the group.
The members promote a new card set featuring the member Riona.
The members promote new Hololive plushies.
The members promote new 3D acrylic stands.
The members promote the Tower Records Pop-up Shop.
The members discuss membership benefits and closing remarks.
